_comment: Frozen LeRobot loss-reduction anchors. These pin the EXACT upstream source locations whose reduction formulas dtwarp's heads must reproduce bit-for-bit at blend=0 (lambda=0). Re-resolve (do NOT hardcode line numbers from memory) whenever the pinned SHA changes. See tests/test_heads.py for the bit-exact regression tests keyed off these formulas.

act_l1.reduction: abs_err = F.l1_loss(target, pred, reduction='none'); valid_mask = ~action_is_pad.unsqueeze(-1); num_valid = valid_mask.sum() * A; loss = (abs_err * valid_mask).sum() / num_valid.clamp_min(1)
act_l1.dtwarp_head: act_head, pad_aware=True; blend=0 MUST equal this scalar

pi0_flow.reduction: u_t = noise - actions; v_t = predicted velocity; losses = F.mse_loss(u_t, v_t, reduction='none'); losses = losses[:,:,:A_real]; loss = losses.mean()   (NO time-pad mask in pi0 forward)
pi0_flow.dtwarp_head: flow_matching_head, pad_aware=False; blend=0 MUST equal plain masked-mean(=mean when no pad)

smolvla_flow.reduction: losses (B,T,A) from model.forward; losses = losses * in_episode_bound.unsqueeze(-1); reduction='none': num_valid = ((~action_is_pad).sum(1) * A).clamp_min(1); per_sample = losses.sum((1,2)) / num_valid
smolvla_flow.dtwarp_head: flow_matching_head, pad_aware=True; blend=0 MUST equal this masked mean

diffusion_epsilon.dtwarp_head: FORBIDDEN for naive soft-DTW swap (epsilon has no temporal shape). dp_x0_aux_head is a v0.2 warned experimental stub only; NOT wired, NOT a CLAIM.
